data.title: Founders of tech cos Rapt (Microsoft) & Krux (Salesforce) launch Kana with $15M funding to help marketing teams accelerate growth & automate admin work.
data.description: Kana, based in San Francisco, has recently secured $15 million in seed funding. This investment aims to assist marketing teams in utilizing agentic AI alongside their data to stimulate growth and enhance efficiencies throughout their operation. Kana offers a range of agents that provide marketers and media firms with customizable, non-intrusive tools for automating workflows, enhancing decision-making, and aligning with consumer behavior in the AI era. The company's emphasis on augmented intelligence also allows users to approve outputs.

data.title: Genesys makes G2's 2026 Best Software Awards for Agentic AI and Customer Service, reaching over 100 million buyers.
data.description: Genesys, a prominent global cloud company specializing in AI-Powered Experience Orchestration, was recently honored by being included in G2’s prestigious 2026 Best Software Awards. This recognition was specifically for being named the Best Agentic AI Software and Best Customer Service Software. G2, which is known as the world’s largest and most reputable software marketplace, attracts a vast audience of over 100 million buyers each year. The annual Best Software Awards by G2 provide rankings for top software companies and products globally, relying on genuine and up-to-date reviews from actual users. This achievement highlights the exceptional quality and impact of Genesys in the software industry.

data.title: Keysight introduces new scale-up validation solutions for AI data centers, addressing bandwidth, latency, and interoperability challenges.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, the latest validation solutions have been introduced to assist data center operators in addressing challenges related to bandwidth, latency, and interoperability. These solutions are crucial as AI infrastructure continues to expand, demanding efficient scalability.

data.title: ISG is studying AI governance service providers for GRCF to boost resilience and transparency. #BusinessWire
data.description: A study has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Conn. focusing on providers utilizing AI for governance, risk, compliance, and fraud (GRCF) to enhance resilience and transparency. This research aims to explore the impact and effectiveness of AI implementation in these areas.

data.title: CBS and Zynga partner to bring Survivor Season 50 to fans through games like Words With Friends and Zynga Poker.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Zynga Inc., a subsidiary of Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ: TTWO) and a prominent player in interactive entertainment, revealed a partnership with CBS to honor the 50th season of Survivor. This collaboration will integrate the unique gameplay of the Emmy-winning reality show into five games within Zynga's collection. This season marks a milestone for Survivor as, for the first time in 25 years, fans will have a say in the game's outcome.

data.title: Airwallex partners with San Francisco Giants, becoming official jersey patch and financial software partner.
data.description: In San Francisco, the Giants have partnered with Airwallex, a prominent global financial platform, in a multi-year deal. This collaboration highlights the innovative work of both organizations on a global scale. Airwallex will feature as the official jersey patch partner for the Giants, with the logo to be displayed on team uniforms for the upcoming season. Furthermore, Airwallex will be recognized as the Giants’ Official Financial Software Partner. This alliance signifies a significant step towards global recognition for both parties in the modern business landscape.

data.title: Messagepoint introduces MARCIEAssure™, an AI-Powered QA solution for Medicare Advantage docs. Enhances QA review cycles.
data.description: A new AI-driven solution called MARCIEAssure™ has been introduced by Messagepoint in Toronto. This innovative tool aims to streamline the quality assurance review process for Medicare Advantage ANOC and EOC documents. With the use of artificial intelligence, MARCIEAssure™ automates QA review cycles, potentially reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.

data.title: MaintainX wins 2026 G2 Best Software Award, reaching over 100M buyers and recognized for its maintenance platform.
data.description: In San Francisco, MaintainX, a top AI-driven maintenance and asset management platform, has been recognized in G2's 2026 Best Software Awards. G2, the world's biggest software marketplace with over 100 million yearly buyers, selects companies based on reviews from real users. This acknowledgment highlights MaintainX's excellence in the industry.

data.title: NEW: Stressed cancer cells produce protein aiding tumor immunity evasion per NYU Langone Health study.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, a recent study conducted by researchers at NYU Langone Health revealed a protein produced by stressed cancer cells aids lung and pancreatic tumors in escaping the immune system's detection. The study suggests that drugs targeting this protein, known as lipocalin, may prove beneficial in combatting these types of cancers. This discovery sheds light on potential new treatment strategies for lung and pancreatic tumors, offering hope in the fight against cancer.

data.title: AI in agriculture increases profit margins by up to 1.9%. Global AI spending to double by 2026, says IDC and IBM study.
data.description: In Lewisville, Texas on February 18, 2026, Ever.Ag revealed plans amidst the rapidly increasing enterprise investment in artificial intelligence. Global spending on AI is expected to more than double from 2023 to 2026, based on reports from IDC and the IBM Institute for Business Value.

data.title: F&G Annuities & Life to report quarterly earnings on 2026-02-19. Analysts estimate EPS of $1.28. Investors await growth forecast.
data.description: F&G Annuities & Life (NYSE: FG) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, 2026-02-19. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.28 for the company. Shareholders are hopeful for an earnings beat and optimistic guidance for the next quarter. It's important to remember that stock prices can be influenced by factors beyond just meeting or missing earnings estimates. Check out the full report for more details.

data.title: TEN Ltd. to present Q4 and year-end 2025 results on March 6, 2026 before the NY market opening. - Important numbers: NYSE:TEN, Q4 and full-year financial results.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Athens, Greece, TEN Ltd. (NYSE:TEN) released news stating it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be made public before the opening of the New York market on Friday, March 6, 2026. TEN Ltd. is a prominent company operating crude, product, and LNG tankers. This report is highly anticipated in the industry as it will provide insights into the Company's performance during that period.

data.title: Etsy's earnings report expected on 2026-02-19 with anticipated EPS of $0.86. Positive outlook sought by investors.
data.description: Etsy (NASDAQ: ETSY) is set to release its latest quarterly earnings report on Thursday, Feb 19, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.86 for the company. Investors are eagerly waiting for the announcement, with hopes of Etsy surpassing these estimates and providing positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is important for new investors to recognize that stock prices can be significantly impacted by future projections rather than solely relying on past performance. In the last quarter, the company exceeded EPS expectations by $0.11. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones index rises before Fed minutes; Nvidia up on Meta deal, AMD falters. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise in anticipation of the release of the Federal Reserve's meeting minutes. Nvidia's stock saw a notable increase following their deal with Meta. Additionally, AMD faced challenges as its stock prices declined. This update highlights the current market trends, with these notable movements: Dow Jones index rising, Nvidia's stock surge due to Meta deal, and AMD witnessing a decline in its stock performance.

data.title: Global call for judges to evaluate achievements across industries for Globee Awards. SAN FRANCISCO, Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: An international appeal is being made for skilled experts to assist in assessing and acknowledging remarkable accomplishments across various sectors and businesses of every scale. The event is the Globee® Awards for Achievement, a key component of the acclaimed Globee Awards collection. This initiative is based in San Francisco and is set to take place on February 18, 2026. The awards program aims to highlight exceptional achievements and success stories, recognizing excellence globally.

data.title: Study finds red raspberries may improve blood sugar response and cognitive function. Published in British Journal of Nutrition. Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: A recent study conducted in Lynden, Washington on February 18, 2026, revealed positive findings related to post-meal blood sugar response, memory, and learning. The study, published in the British Journal of Nutrition, discovered that a minor dietary change has the potential to enhance metabolic and brain health with age. The research highlighted significant improvements in post-meal blood sugar levels as well as memory and learning functions. These promising results suggest that incorporating this dietary addition could support overall health outcomes in the aging population.

data.title: 20 recipients awarded for Kitchen Innovations by National Restaurant Association Show in 2026. Labor pressures and efficiency considerations key.
data.description: This year's Kitchen Innovations selections at the National Restaurant Association Restaurant, Hotel-Motel Show® in Chicago on February 18, 2026, highlight the impact of labor pressures and operational efficiency. A total of 20 recipients have been chosen for the 2026 Kitchen Innovations (KI) Awards, showcasing innovative solutions that address these challenges in the industry. These awards aim to acknowledge cutting-edge advancements in the culinary world and assist restaurants and hotels in navigating the evolving landscape.
